official_functions.role: Construct the official empty literal Component reason fixture
Construct the official Login clientbound login_disconnect packet fixture
Write the official Login clientbound login_disconnect body
Write the full Login clientbound framed login_disconnect packet
Dispatch and decode the full Login clientbound framed login_disconnect packet
Name the packet id assigned in Login clientbound state
Read the decoded Login disconnect reason from the official packet instance and confirm the Login listener clientbound surface

invariants: The official Login clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the login_disconnect reason body.
The official Login clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundLoginDisconnectPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundLoginDisconnectPacket preserves the empty literal Component reason fixture.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, reason fixture, reason text, Login clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove UI disconnect handling, screen flow, authentication failure handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer UI disconnect handling, screen flow, authentication failure handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
